title: Bootstrap Joni as the Maestro LinkedIn content and performance specialist

goal.value: Bootstrap Joni as the Maestro LinkedIn content and performance specialist

inputs.agent_current_focus: Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval.
inputs.agent_owns: authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String: node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs plan --name "Joni" --role "LinkedIn content and performance specialist" --owns "authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports" --current-focus "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval." --slack-bot "false" --reporting-channel "#maestro"

node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs materialize --name "Joni" --role "LinkedIn content and performance specialist" --owns "authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports" --current-focus "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval." --slack-bot "false" --reporting-channel "#maestro"

node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs validate --name "Joni" --role "LinkedIn content and performance specialist" --owns "authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports" --current-focus "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval." --slack-bot "false" --reporting-channel "#maestro"

node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs verify --name "Joni" --role "LinkedIn content and performance specialist" --owns "authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports" --current-focus "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval." --slack-bot "false" --reporting-channel "#maestro" && node --test scripts/hermes/test-agent-registry.mjs scripts/hermes/test-specialist-profiles.mjs

node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs handoff --name "Joni" --role "LinkedIn content and performance specialist" --owns "authorized LinkedIn content capture,Maestro LinkedIn post calendar,draft creation,performance monitoring,weekly insight reports" --current-focus "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval." --slack-bot "false" --reporting-channel "#maestro"

goal.String: Bootstrap Joni as the Maestro LinkedIn content and performance specialist

spec.graph_source:
digraph CreateHermesAgent {
    graph [
        goal="Bootstrap a new Maestro Hermes agent profile with registry, memory, skills/docs, verification, and optional Slack bot setup pack",
        persona="quincy",
        inputs="agent_name,agent_role,agent_owns,agent_current_focus,agent_slack_bot,agent_reporting_channel",
        outputs="agent_profile,agent_registry_entry,agent_slack_manifest,agent_bootstrap_handoff",
        default_max_retries=1,
        retry_target="materialize_agent_artifacts",
        fallback_retry_target="verify_agent_artifacts",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { provider: openai; model: gpt-5.4-mini; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .coding { provider: openai; model: gpt-5.4-mini; reasoning_effort: medium; }
            .review { provider: gemini; model: gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: medium; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    validate_agent_request [
        label="Validate Agent Request",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="validate_agent_request",
        script="node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs validate --name \"{{ inputs.agent_name|default('Nina') }}\" --role \"{{ inputs.agent_role|default('Research specialist') }}\" --owns \"{{ inputs.agent_owns|default('market research,source review') }}\" --current-focus \"{{ inputs.agent_current_focus|default('Build durable research judgment for Maestro.') }}\" --slack-bot \"{{ inputs.agent_slack_bot|default('false') }}\" --reporting-channel \"{{ inputs.agent_reporting_channel|default('') }}\""
    ]

    write_agent_plan [
        label="Write Agent Bootstrap Plan",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="validate_agent_request",
        script="node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs plan --name \"{{ inputs.agent_name|default('Nina') }}\" --role \"{{ inputs.agent_role|default('Research specialist') }}\" --owns \"{{ inputs.agent_owns|default('market research,source review') }}\" --current-focus \"{{ inputs.agent_current_focus|default('Build durable research judgment for Maestro.') }}\" --slack-bot \"{{ inputs.agent_slack_bot|default('false') }}\" --reporting-channel \"{{ inputs.agent_reporting_channel|default('') }}\""
    ]

    materialize_agent_artifacts [
        label="Materialize Agent Artifacts",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_agent_artifacts",
        script="node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs materialize --name \"{{ inputs.agent_name|default('Nina') }}\" --role \"{{ inputs.agent_role|default('Research specialist') }}\" --owns \"{{ inputs.agent_owns|default('market research,source review') }}\" --current-focus \"{{ inputs.agent_current_focus|default('Build durable research judgment for Maestro.') }}\" --slack-bot \"{{ inputs.agent_slack_bot|default('false') }}\" --reporting-channel \"{{ inputs.agent_reporting_channel|default('') }}\""
    ]

    verify_agent_artifacts [
        label="Verify Agent Artifacts",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_agent_artifacts",
        script="node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs verify --name \"{{ inputs.agent_name|default('Nina') }}\" --role \"{{ inputs.agent_role|default('Research specialist') }}\" --owns \"{{ inputs.agent_owns|default('market research,source review') }}\" --current-focus \"{{ inputs.agent_current_focus|default('Build durable research judgment for Maestro.') }}\" --slack-bot \"{{ inputs.agent_slack_bot|default('false') }}\" --reporting-channel \"{{ inputs.agent_reporting_channel|default('') }}\" && node --test scripts/hermes/test-agent-registry.mjs scripts/hermes/test-specialist-profiles.mjs"
    ]

    slack_bot_install_approval [
        label="Slack Bot Install Approval",
        shape=hexagon
    ]

    write_handoff [
        label="Write Agent Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="verify_agent_artifacts",
        script="node scripts/hermes/bootstrap-agent.mjs handoff --name \"{{ inputs.agent_name|default('Nina') }}\" --role \"{{ inputs.agent_role|default('Research specialist') }}\" --owns \"{{ inputs.agent_owns|default('market research,source review') }}\" --current-focus \"{{ inputs.agent_current_focus|default('Build durable research judgment for Maestro.') }}\" --slack-bot \"{{ inputs.agent_slack_bot|default('false') }}\" --reporting-channel \"{{ inputs.agent_reporting_channel|default('') }}\""
    ]

    start -> validate_agent_request
    validate_agent_request -> write_agent_plan [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    validate_agent_request -> validate_agent_request [label="Fix Request", loop_restart=true, max_visits=2]
    write_agent_plan -> materialize_agent_artifacts [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    write_agent_plan -> validate_agent_request [label="Repair Plan Input", loop_restart=true]
    materialize_agent_artifacts -> verify_agent_artifacts [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    materialize_agent_artifacts -> materialize_agent_artifacts [label="Repair Artifacts", loop_restart=true, max_visits=2]
    verify_agent_artifacts -> slack_bot_install_approval [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_agent_artifacts -> materialize_agent_artifacts [label="Repair Verification", loop_restart=true]
    slack_bot_install_approval -> write_handoff [label="[A] Approve Slack setup pack / continue"]
    slack_bot_install_approval -> write_handoff [label="[S] Skip separate Slack bot"]
    write_handoff -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    write_handoff -> materialize_agent_artifacts [label="Repair"]
}

diff.patch:
diff --git a/hermes/agents/name-pool.md b/hermes/agents/name-pool.md
index 68dd0e4..d9de823 100644
--- a/hermes/agents/name-pool.md
+++ b/hermes/agents/name-pool.md
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ Naming rule: Maestro agents use first names of musicians from history. Prefer re
 
 ## Active
 
+- Joni - LinkedIn content and performance specialist
 - Miles - general Maestro operator.
 - Quincy - Fabro and DevOps specialist.
 - Johann - email/content drafting worker.
@@ -36,7 +37,6 @@ Naming rule: Maestro agents use first names of musicians from history. Prefer re
 - Aretha
 - Etta
 - Dolly
-- Joni
 - Carole
 - Roberta
 - Mavis
diff --git a/hermes/agents/registry.json b/hermes/agents/registry.json
index 8ca615a..abc9cd3 100644
--- a/hermes/agents/registry.json
+++ b/hermes/agents/registry.json
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "version": 1,
-  "updated": "2026-05-16",
+  "updated": "2026-05-17",
   "naming_policy": "Named agents should use first names of musicians from history. Existing legacy profile names can remain until renamed intentionally.",
   "agents": [
     {
@@ -84,6 +84,23 @@
       "memory_peer": "quill",
       "current_focus": "Draft and inspect GTM work; do not send/import/mutate without approval.",
       "handoff": "timeout 900 hermes -p quill chat -q \"<task brief>\""
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "Joni",
+      "profile": "joni",
+      "status": "active",
+      "interface": "internal Hermes profile",
+      "role": "LinkedIn content and performance specialist",
+      "owns": [
+        "authorized LinkedIn content capture",
+        "Maestro LinkedIn post calendar",
+        "draft creation",
+        "performance monitoring",
+        "weekly insight reports"
+      ],
+      "memory_peer": "joni",
+      "current_focus": "Build a reliable LinkedIn operating loop: capture authorized content signals daily, draft five Maestro posts per week, monitor performance, and report what is working without publishing without approval.",
+      "handoff": "timeout 900 hermes -p joni chat -q \"<task brief>\""
     }
   ]
 }
diff --git a/hermes/profiles/joni/SOUL.md b/hermes/profiles/joni/SOUL.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2efc838
--- /dev/null
+++ b/hermes/profiles/joni/SOUL.md
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+# Joni
+
+You are Joni, LinkedIn content and performance specialist for Maestro.
+
+Your job is to build deep operating judgment in your domain, complete delegated work with evidence, and improve the Maestro operating system when repeated patterns emerge.
+
+## Scope
+
+Own:
+
+- authorized LinkedIn content capture
+- Maestro LinkedIn post calendar
+- draft creation
+- performance monitoring
+- weekly insight reports
+
+Do not own:
+
+- Broad business strategy unless explicitly delegated by Miles.
+- Payments, production deploys, outbound sends/imports, customer data operations, or public publishing unless your profile-specific rules explicitly allow it.
+- Secret handling beyond presence-only checks.
+
+## Default Loop
+
+1. Clarify objective, current state, allowed actions, forbidden actions, and exit criteria.
+2. Inspect existing ledgers, docs, skills, and linked artifacts before acting.
+3. Use deterministic scripts, workflows, and gates where available.
+4. Persist durable state in the right ledger/doc, not just chat.
+5. Report concise status, evidence, decision, next action, and risks.
+6. Convert repeated work into a skill or Fabro workflow proposal.
+
+## Trust Boundary
+
+- Never print secrets or run broad environment dumps.
+- Do not claim work is complete without verification evidence.
+- Escalate when approval, missing credentials, ambiguous ownership, or material risk blocks progress.
+- Prefer internal handoff through Miles unless this profile has its own Slack gateway.
+
+## Learning
+
+Use Honcho for cross-session domain judgment and user preferences. Use ledgers for operational state. Use repo docs and skills for procedures. Do not store logs, secrets, customer data, or full run histories in memory.
diff --git a/hermes/scripts/install-worker-profiles.sh b/hermes/scripts/install-worker-profiles.sh
index 9ae066a..430bd21 100755
--- a/hermes/scripts/install-worker-profiles.sh
+++ b/hermes/scripts/install-worker-profiles.sh
@@ -71,6 +71,7 @@ install_worker smith
 install_worker johann
 install_worker quill
 install_worker quincy
+install_worker joni
 retire_legacy_profile fabro-operator quincy
 
 printf 'worker profiles installed\n'
